comparator: StringComparator — one rapidfuzz token_sort_ratio similarity per string field (single-metric floor, NOT multi-metric Magellan-class)
notes: Zero-spend (rapidfuzz + scikit-learn). HONEST f1 uses a threshold derived on TRAIN via Youden and applied to the FULL test split; argmax_on_test is the leaky ceiling that tunes the threshold on the test set itself (honesty_delta_f1 = argmax_on_test.f1 - honest.f1). gap_to_ditto_f1 measures the honest number against the Ditto SOTA band; the gap is expected — this is a single-metric StringComparator floor, not a multi-feature replication.
